name: revit_export_room_svg
description: Exports a room plan boundary to an SVG file scaled to a 100x100 viewBox.

room_id.description: Element id of the room to export

output_path.description: Full path for the output .svg file

notes: Current implementation uses interactive room pick and SaveFileDialog. Non-linear boundary curves are approximated as line segments only. Only the first boundary loop is exported.
